# Trend Scout Daily Briefing — 2026-04-24

_Generated: 2026-04-24T09:32 UTC | Sources: Trendshift.io, TrustMRR.com_

---

## 🔥 Top 5 "Wow + Money" Overlap Projects

Projects trending on GitHub AND validated by revenue/proven business models:

### 1. AI Agent Skills Ecosystem (CLAUDE.md / Agent Skills Collections)
- **Trendshift:** CLAUDE.md (81.1k ⭐), 1000+ Agent Skills Collection (18.3k ⭐), Production-grade AI agent skills (20.8k ⭐), Marketing skills for AI agents (23.8k ⭐), Desktop skill manager (338 ⭐)
- **Why winning:** The entire "skills for AI coding agents" category is exploding. Multiple repos with tens of thousands of stars. This is the new "package manager" moment — agents need reusable skills, and the ecosystem is self-organizing around it.
- **Money signal:** TrustMRR shows multiple AI-agent-adjacent SaaS companies thriving (Bookedin $50k MRR, ChatDash $47k MRR, DM Champ $187k MRR) — all selling "AI agents as a service" which is the commercial flip side.

### 2. LLM Observability & DevTooling (Langfuse / Code Search MCP)
- **Trendshift:** Langfuse (25.8k ⭐) — LLM observability, evals, prompt management (YC W23). Code Search MCP (8.3k ⭐).
- **Money signal:** Cometly ($216k MRR) — marketing attribution for SaaS using AI. Same "measure and optimize AI/automation outputs" thesis.
- **Why winning:** As AI agent adoption grows, the tooling to monitor, evaluate, and debug them becomes critical infrastructure. Langfuse is becoming the de facto open-source standard.

### 3. AI-Powered SEO & Content
- **Trendshift:** Design system files for AI agents (62.9k ⭐), AI short video engine (6.3k ⭐)
- **TrustMRR:** SeoBOT ($73k MRR, 7% growth), SEO Stack ($66k MRR), AEO Engine ($54k MRR, 8%), Launch Club ($48k MRR), LocalRank.so ($48k MRR)
- **Why winning:** SEO is being reinvented for the AI era (AEO — Answer Engine Optimization). Multiple companies printing $50-70k MRR in this niche. Open-source design systems let AI agents generate better content at scale.

### 4. AI Video Generation
- **Trendshift:** AI short video engine (6.3k ⭐)
- **TrustMRR:** Vid.AI ($95k MRR), Speel.co ($65k MRR), Interactive Video SaaS ($45k MRR)
- **Why winning:** Short-form video content creation is being fully automated. Multiple companies at $50-95k MRR. The Trendshift projects show the open-source community catching up to commercial tools.

### 5. Resume/Career Tech
- **Trendshift:** Coding Interview University (341.7k ⭐), Build Your Own X (492.8k ⭐)
- **TrustMRR:** Rezi ($286k MRR, 54% growth 🔥)
- **Why winning:** Rezi's 54% growth rate is the highest in the top 10. Career/preparation content on GitHub is perennial. Rezi monetizes the same audience that stars these educational repos.

---

## 💰 Top 5 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About

TrustMRR high-revenue with no Trendshift presence:

### 1. Stan — $3.57M MRR
- Enables people to make a living working for themselves
- **Business model:** Creator economy platform (likely marketplace/SaaS)
- **Why hidden:** Not on GitHub, not developer-focused. Pure consumer/creator play.
- **Hot take:** $3.5M MRR is staggering. Creator economy tools are quietly massive.

### 2. TrimRx — $332k MRR (11% growth)
- Telehealth for GLP-1 weight loss programs
- **Business model:** Telehealth marketplace connecting patients with providers
- **Why hidden:** Healthcare, not tech. But it's a SaaS-ified healthcare company.
- **Hot take:** GLP-1 telehealth is the "quietest $300k/mo business" in America right now.

### 3. Kibu — $234k MRR
- Content, compliance, and EHR software for I/DD service providers
- **Business model:** Vertical SaaS for specialized healthcare providers across 48 states
- **Why hidden:** Extremely niche — serves organizations helping people with intellectual/developmental disabilities. Zero developer hype, massive value.

### 4. Supliful — $196k MRR (5% growth)
- All-in-one platform for creators to launch CPG brands
- **Business model:** Marketplace + SaaS — unified product selection, e-commerce, fulfillment
- **Why hidden:** Creator-to-commerce is hot but not in developer circles.

### 5. DM Champ — $187k MRR (2% growth)
- AI sales agent that works 24/7, can be white-labeled
- **Business model:** SaaS + white-label/reseller model
- **Why hidden:** "AI selling AI" — not open-source, not on GitHub, but printing money in the B2B sales automation space.

---

## 🚀 Top 5 Trending Projects with No Monetization

Trendshift-only projects — pure opportunity:

### 1. Leaked System Prompts Collection — 22.5k ⭐
- System prompts for ChatGPT, Gemini, Grok, Claude, Perplexity, Cursor, Devin, Replit
- **Opportunity:** Prompt engineering as a service. Build tools that audit, optimize, and manage system prompts for enterprises deploying AI.
- **Category:** AI DevTools

### 2. RAG-Anything — 18.1k ⭐
- All-in-one RAG framework
- **Opportunity:** Hosted RAG-as-a-service. Companies want RAG but don't want to manage infrastructure. Turn this into a managed API.
- **Category:** AI Infrastructure

### 3. Headless Browser for AI Agents — 1.6k ⭐
- **Opportunity:** Browser automation as a managed service for AI agents. Charge per page/scrape. Enterprise needs are huge.
- **Category:** AI Infrastructure / Web Scraping

### 4. OpenMetadata — 12.1k ⭐
- Unified metadata platform for data discovery and governance
- **Opportunity:** Already has enterprise adoption but could offer a cloud-hosted version. Data governance is a compliance necessity (GDPR, AI Act).
- **Category:** Data Infrastructure

### 5. Hermes WebUI — 3.3k ⭐
- Web interface for using Hermes Agent
- **Opportunity:** Consumer-friendly AI agent UI. If agents are the future, the "browser for agents" is a massive opportunity.
- **Category:** AI Consumer Tools

---

## 📊 Key Patterns

### 1. The "Skills for Agents" Meta-Trend
The single biggest trend across Trendshift. CLAUDE.md, agent skills collections, skill managers, marketing skills, design skills — the ecosystem is self-organizing around reusable, composable capabilities for AI coding agents. This is npm/crates.io for AI agents.

### 2. AEO (Answer Engine Optimization) is the New SEO
Multiple TrustMRR companies ($50-73k MRR each) are built around optimizing for AI search engines (ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews). This category didn't exist 18 months ago and now has 5+ companies at $50k+ MRR.

### 3. Vertical AI SaaS > Horizontal AI SaaS
The highest-revenue TrustMRR companies aren't general AI tools — they're AI applied to specific verticals: healthcare (TrimRx, Kibu), creator commerce (Supliful), legal/compliance, real estate. Vertical wins.

### 4. Open Source is Eating Agent Infrastructure
Langfuse (observability), RAG-Anything, code search MCP, headless browser — core agent infrastructure is being open-sourced. The money is in the application layer on top.

### 5. Stealth/Unnamed Companies Dominate High MRR
#2 ($381k MRR) and #10 ($183k MRR) on TrustMRR are unnamed/stealth. The most profitable AI businesses are still in stealth — public leaderboards only show the tip of the iceberg.

---

## 💡 Quick Takes

1. **Build a "skills marketplace" for AI agents.** The Trendshift data screams demand. Someone will build the npm-for-agents. If you're fast, that's you. Multiple repos with 18k-81k stars prove the community is ready.

2. **AEO agencies will be the new SEO agencies.** TrustMRR shows 5+ companies at $50-70k MRR doing AI search optimization. This is 2010-era SEO all over again. First-mover advantage is now.

3. **Healthcare + AI is the quietest goldmine.** TrimRx ($332k MRR), Kibu ($234k MRR), Hormone prescribing ($149k MRR) — three healthcare companies in the top 15. No developer hype, massive recurring revenue. The money is where the developers aren't looking.

---

# Trend Scout Daily Market Intelligence — 2026-04-23

Sources: Trendshift.io homepage snapshot for 2026-04-22 rising GitHub engagement; TrustMRR.com verified startup revenue database fetched 2026-04-23 01:00 UTC.

## Executive Summary

Today’s hype is overwhelmingly around **AI-agent infrastructure, coding-agent skills, MCP/code context, self-hosted intelligence dashboards, and AI-generated media**. Today’s revenue leaderboard is less GitHub-native: **creator monetization, telehealth/GLP-1, resume/job tools, attribution, AI sales/marketing automation, social scheduling, SEO/AEO, and video/content generation**.

Direct name overlap between Trendshift top projects and TrustMRR top revenue startups is **zero**. Category overlap is strong: AI agents, video generation, social/marketing automation, SEO/AEO, and intelligence/monitoring.

## Cross-Reference Analysis

### Projects on BOTH Trendshift and TrustMRR

**Exact overlap: none found.**

The winners are category-level overlaps, not same-name companies:

1. **AI video generation/editing**
   - Trendshift: browser-use/video-use, Anil-matcha/Open-Generative-AI
   - TrustMRR: Vid.AI ($94.9k MRR), Speel.co below top 20 ($65.8k MRR)
   - Why it wins: creators and marketers want output, not tooling. Open-source creates experimentation; SaaS packages distribution-ready results.

2. **Agentic social/marketing automation**
   - Trendshift: TrendRadar, worldmonitor, agency-agents, agent-skills
   - TrustMRR: Postiz ($97.5k), Cometly ($215.4k), DM Champ ($186.9k), PROSP ($128k), SEOBOT ($74k)
   - Why it wins: agents are valuable when tied to revenue workflows: ads, outreach, SEO, social, conversion.

3. **Coding-agent enablement**
   - Trendshift: andrej-karpathy-skills, agent-skills, superpowers, claude-context, opencode
   - TrustMRR: Codédex ($84.3k) is education, not agent infra
   - Why it wins on hype: developers are aggressively retooling their workflows. Revenue capture is still indirect via cloud, enterprise, training, or consulting.

4. **Monitoring/intelligence dashboards**
   - Trendshift: worldmonitor, TrendRadar, OpenMetadata
   - TrustMRR: Cometly, SEO STACK, AEO Engine, polysight.app below top 20
   - Why it wins: people pay when dashboards attach to decisions that make/save money.

## Trendshift Projects With Zero Clear Monetization

Highest opportunity list:

- **agent-skills / superpowers / andrej-karpathy-skills / taste-skill / awesome-design-md** — Package as managed skill libraries, eval suites, team templates, or agent workflow consulting.
- **TrendRadar / worldmonitor** — Hosted trend-intelligence SaaS for founders, investors, and comms teams.
- **RAG-Anything / claude-context** — Enterprise support, hosted indexing, private-cloud deployment, compliance-ready agent context.
- **video-use / Open-Generative-AI** — Hosted video automation with templates, team workflows, and brand safety.
- **Stirling-PDF / Pi-hole** — Already utility-heavy; monetization can be managed cloud, business support, or compliance packaging.

## TrustMRR Money-Makers Nobody’s Talking About

- **Stan — $3.57M MRR:** Creator commerce keeps printing while dev Twitter talks agent frameworks.
- **TrimRx — $307.9k MRR:** GLP-1 telehealth remains a cash machine with operational/compliance moat.
- **Kibu — $234.3k MRR:** Vertical healthcare SaaS beats generic AI hype by owning compliance workflows.
- **1Capture — $214.9k MRR:** Conversion uplift without product changes is an easy executive buy.
- **Supliful — $197.1k MRR:** Creator-led CPG infra monetizes audience-to-product demand.

## Conclusions

### Top Trends

1. **Agent skills are the new framework layer.** Multiple top repos are not apps; they are behavior packs, design files, and methodology for coding agents.
2. **Revenue is strongest where AI touches distribution.** Ads, SEO, LinkedIn outreach, social scheduling, video, and conversion tools dominate TrustMRR.
3. **Open-source hype favors infrastructure; MRR favors outcomes.** Developers star sandboxes, RAG, context, and agent frameworks; buyers pay for leads, customers, resumes, compliance, and content.
4. **Vertical SaaS is quietly durable.** Kibu, TrimRx, medical consulting, and Rezi show specific workflows can outperform broad AI tooling.
5. **Self-hosted remains a strong wedge.** Pi-hole, Stirling-PDF, TrendRadar, OpenMetadata: privacy/control attracts attention and can feed hosted/support monetization.

### Money vs Hype Gap

- **Hyped but not monetizing:** AI skills, CLAUDE.md files, coding-agent taste/design packs, open-source intelligence dashboards.
- **Quietly printing:** creator commerce, telehealth, resume SaaS, vertical EHR/compliance, marketing attribution, sales/outreach automation.
- **Best bridge:** turn open-source agent excitement into packaged revenue workflows: SEO agents, social agents, codebase context, hosted monitoring, video production.

### Opportunities

- **Hosted TrendRadar/worldmonitor for founders/investors:** daily competitive intel, Telegram/Slack alerts, saved queries, paid team plans.
- **Agent skill marketplace:** curated production-grade skills, evals, versioning, team policy, private libraries.
- **AI coding-context appliance:** secure MCP/code search for teams with compliance, audit logs, and IDE/Claude Code integrations.
- **Vertical AI sales agents:** DM Champ proves buyers pay for automated closers; clone pattern into dentists, medspas, real estate, legal intake.
- **Self-hosted-to-cloud packaging:** Stirling-PDF/Pi-hole-style tools can monetize via managed hosting and business support.

### Quick Takes

- The open-source crowd is building the **picks and shovels** for agents; the MRR crowd is selling **finished outcomes**.
- “Agentic” only monetizes when attached to a painful KPI: leads, conversion, SEO traffic, content throughput, compliance cost.
- The current gap: tons of starred repos help agents work better, but few give managers a clean ROI dashboard. That’s the product opening.

---

| 20 | **desktop-skill-manager** | 338 | AI/Dev Tools | Desktop app to manage AI agent skills across 20+ platforms |

### Trendshift Patterns
- **Claude Code ecosystem dominance** — 8 of 20 projects directly serve Claude Code / AI coding agents
- **Agent skills as the new "plugins"** — Skills frameworks, collections, and managers are exploding
- **Design-meets-AI** — DESIGN.md and Huashu point to AI agents generating production UI
- **Transparency/leaks as content** — Leaked system prompts at 22.5k stars shows demand for AI system transparency

---

## TrustMRR — Top Startups by MRR

| # | Startup | MRR | Growth | Category | Business Model |
|---|---------|-----|--------|----------|----------------|
| 1 | **Stan** | $3,569,654 | — | Creator Economy | Platform enabling people to make a living independently |
| 2 | **Unnamed Company** | $381,858 | 7% | Unknown | — |
| 3 | **TrimRx** | $332,278 | 11% | Health/Telehealth | Telehealth weight loss (GLP-1 meds: Semaglutide, Tirzepatide) |
| 4 | **Rezi** | $286,433 | 54% | HR/Job Tech | Resume builder SaaS + enterprise + marketplace |
| 5 | **Kibu** | $234,319 | — | Health/SaaS | EHR + compliance for I/DD provider organizations (48 states) |
| 6 | **Cometly** | $216,361 | 5% | Marketing/Analytics | AI-powered marketing attribution for SaaS companies |
| 7 | **1Capture** | $215,871 | 2% | SaaS/Conversion | Trial-to-paid conversion optimization without product changes |
| 8 | **Supliful** | $196,240 | 5% | E-commerce/Creator | All-in-one CPG brand platform for creators |

### TrustMRR Notables Beyond Top 20
- **Ryze AI** (#24): $65,233 MRR, **177% growth** — AI agents managing Google & Meta ads (fastest grower)
- **Besbet** (#33): $54,287 MRR, **50% growth** — high growth, unknown details
- **Stealth social tool** (#34): $51,536 MRR, **49% growth** — social network distribution tool
- **BackPedal** (#29): $56,521 MRR, **42% growth** — GPS bike tracking & recovery
- **Indexsy** (#46): $39,556 MRR, **139% growth** — digital asset building & scaling
- **ChatDash** (#40): $47,369 MRR, **24% growth** — white-label AI assistant dashboard for agencies

---

## Cross-Reference: Trendshift × TrustMRR

### Overlap Projects (Trending + Making Money)

**No direct project overlap** between the two lists today. Trendshift is dominated by open-source developer/AI tools, while TrustMRR skews toward bootstrapped SaaS in health, marketing, and creator economy.

This gap itself is the insight: **open-source hype and bootstrapped revenue live in different worlds.**

### Adjacent Overlaps (Thematic)

| Theme | Trendshift Side | TrustMRR Side | Insight |
|-------|----------------|---------------|---------|
| **AI Video Generation** | AI Short Video Engine (6.3k ⭐) | Vid.AI ($95k MRR), Speel ($65k MRR) | Open-source tools trending while commercial versions already printing money |
| **AI for SEO/Marketing** | SeoBOT ($73k MRR), Cometly ($216k MRR), AEO Engine ($55k MRR) | Agent skills for marketing (23.8k ⭐) | AI marketing skills are hot open-source AND monetizing as SaaS |
| **Code Education** | build-your-own-x (492.8k ⭐), study plan (341.7k ⭐) | Codédex ($84k MRR) | Massive free demand exists; Codédex proves Gen Z will pay |
| **LLM Observability** | Langfuse (25.8k ⭐, YC W23) | — | Open-source leader but no bootstrapped competitor in top 50 MRR |
| **AI Agent Infrastructure** | headless-browser-ai, code-search-mcp | DM Champ ($187k MRR, AI sales agent) | Infrastructure trending; vertical AI agents already monetizing |

---

## Top 5 "Wow + Money" — Thematic Winners

1. **AI Video Generation** — Trending open-source engines + Vid.AI at $95k MRR + Speel at $65k MRR. The gap between free tools and paid is narrow; monetization is in polish & distribution.
2. **AI Agent Skills Ecosystem** — 3 trending repos (skills collection 18.3k, production skills 20.8k, skills framework 1.4k) + DM Champ at $187k MRR selling AI sales agents. Skills are the new API.
3. **AI-Powered Marketing** — Cometly ($216k), SeoBOT ($73k), Prosp ($128k), Postiz ($97k) all monetizing while agent marketing skills trend on GitHub.
4. **Developer Education** — build-your-own-x (492.8k ⭐) + study plan (341.7k ⭐) + Codédex ($84k MRR). Education is evergreen and monetizable.
5. **Claude Code Ecosystem** — 8 trending repos serve Claude Code. No direct MRR winner yet, but the platform effect is massive. First mover to monetize Claude Code skill marketplaces wins.

## Top 5 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About

1. **Kibu** — $234k MRR, zero hype. Niche EHR for I/DD providers across 48 states. Regulatory moat + underserved market.
2. **1Capture** — $216k MRR, 2% growth. Trial-to-paid conversion without code changes. Boring but extremely valuable.
3. **TrimRx** — $332k MRR, 11% growth. GLP-1 telehealth is booming quietly. Weight loss + AI = sticky subscription.
4. **Dealsourcr** — $148k MRR, 19% growth. Property deal sourcing. Unsexy real estate tech with solid growth.
5. **ChatDash** — $47k MRR, 24% growth. White-label AI dashboards for agencies. Picks and shovels for the AI agency gold rush.

## Top 5 Trending with No Monetization (Opportunities)

1. **CLAUDE.md** (81.1k ⭐) — Config files for Claude Code behavior. Zero monetization. **Opportunity:** Premium curated CLAUDE.md templates for enterprises.
2. **Leaked System Prompts** (22.5k ⭐) — Transparency project, no revenue. **Opportunity:** Paid newsletter/alerts for prompt changes; red-teaming service.
3. **RAG-Anything** (18.1k ⭐) — Open-source RAG framework. **Opportunity:** Hosted RAG-as-a-service; enterprise support.
4. **Code Search MCP** (8.3k ⭐) — Codebase context for AI agents. **Opportunity:** Cloud-hosted version for non-technical teams.
5. **ML-Intern** (1.5k ⭐) — Open-source ML engineer. **Opportunity:** Managed ML pipeline service; "ML-as-a-intern" SaaS.

---

## Key Patterns

1. **Claude Code is the new platform.** 8/20 trending repos serve it directly. The ecosystem is forming faster than VS Code extensions did in 2016.
2. **Health tech is quietly printing money.** TrimRx ($332k), Kibu ($234k), Hormone Clinic ($150k) — 3 of top 12 are health. No health projects trending on GitHub.
3. **The AI agent skills gold rush is real.** Skills collections, frameworks, managers, and marketplaces are exploding. The infrastructure is being built NOW.
4. **Bootstrapped SaaS > VC-backed hype.** TrustMRR shows hundreds of solo/small-team SaaS doing $50k-$200k MRR. No VC needed. The trendshift list has zero overlap with TrustMRR — hype and revenue are decoupled.
5. **GLP-1 economy is a startup category.** TrimRx at $332k MRR is just the tip. Weight loss telehealth is a goldmine.

## Money vs Hype Gap

- **Hyped but not monetizing:** Claude Code ecosystem tools, agent skills frameworks, leaked prompts. Massive engagement, zero direct revenue. These are picks-and-shovels for someone else's gold rush.
- **Monetizing but not hyped:** Kibu ($234k), 1Capture ($216k), TrimRx ($332k), Dealsourcr ($148k). Boring niches with real customers paying real money. No Twitter threads needed.

## Quick Takes

- **Build for Claude Code now.** The ecosystem is at VS Code extension circa 2017. First movers in skill marketplaces, premium templates, and enterprise tooling will capture massive value.
- **Health + AI is the stealth goldmine.** Three health startups in TrustMRR top 12. Zero health projects on Trendshift. The gap between what developers find exciting and what actually makes money has never been wider.
- **Ryze AI's 177% growth at $65k MRR is the signal.** AI managing ad spend is the next "AI writing assistant" — everyone needs it, early players win. Watch this space.

---

_Report generated by Trend Analyst | 2026-04-24 | Data: trendshift.io + trustmrr.com_

### 💰 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About (TrustMRR Only, High Revenue, Low Hype)

1. **Stan ($3.57M MRR)** — Self-employment platform. Zero hype on GitHub, absolutely printing money. The MRR is 10x the #2 spot.

4. **Supliful ($197k MRR)** — Creator CPG platform. Bridge between influencer economy and physical products.

1. **Leaked System Prompts (25.4k★)** — Pure transparency play. Could monetize via premium analysis/monitoring service.

3. **ml-intern (1.5k★)** — Open-source ML engineer. Could offer managed ML training as a service.
4. **Desktop AI Skills Manager (1k★)** — Multi-platform skill management. SaaS with sync/team features.
5. **RAG-Anything (18.1k★)** — RAG framework with no clear monetization. Hosted RAG-as-a-service is obvious next step.

---

## Key Patterns

1. **AI Agent Skills are the new packages** — Multiple repos (18k, 22k, 8k stars) are building skill ecosystems for coding agents. This is becoming a standard layer, like npm for AI. Expect consolidation.
2. **SEO is being rebuilt for AI** — SEOBOT, AEO Engine, SEO STACK, Launch Club all targeting AI-era search optimization. The entire SEO industry is pivoting from Google-blue-links to LLM-visibility.
3. **Health/telehealth is quietly massive** — TrimRx ($324k), Kibu ($234k), Medical Practice ($151k). None trending on GitHub. Regulated verticals = moats = money.
4. **Design systems for AI coding agents** — DESIGN.md (64.5k★), Huashu Design (4.7k★). People are building brand systems specifically for AI agents to consume. New category.
5. **Creator economy tools are bifurcating** — Stan ($3.57M MRR) vs. AI short video engine (6.3k★). One makes money helping creators sell; the other excites devs automating content.

---

## Quick Takes

- **Build for agents, sell to agencies.** DM Champ ($187k), PROSP ($128k), Bookedin ($50k) all sell AI agent capacity to agencies who resell it. The B2B2B model for AI agents is proven.
- **If you're building RAG tools, ship a hosted version yesterday.** RAG-Anything has 18k stars and zero MRR. The gap between GitHub love and revenue is where competitors win.
- **Stan at $3.57M MRR with zero dev-community presence proves: you don't need to be loved by Hacker News to win.** The biggest money is in boring verticals with real customers.

---

### 🔥 Projects on BOTH Lists (Hype + Money)

| Project | Trendshift Rank | TrustMRR Context | Why It Wins |
|---------|----------------|-------------------|-------------|
| **PostHog** | #4 (33.1k ⭐) | Product analytics powerhouse | Open-source + self-hostable = dev trust. Product-led growth. |
| **Postiz** | Trending in agentic social | #14 ($97k MRR, 16% growth) | Open-source social scheduler riding the AI agent wave |
| **AI Video/Image Generation** (Stagehand + Vid.AI/Speel) | #9, #15 (browser+media) | Vid.AI $94.7k, Speel $65.8k | AI content creation is both hyped AND monetizing |

**Note:** Low overlap this cycle — GitHub trending is dominated by Claude Code ecosystem tooling (dev-focused, open-source), while TrustMRR is dominated by bootstrapped SaaS in healthcare, SEO, and creator tools. These are different audiences.

### 💰 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About (TrustMRR Only)

1. **Stan** ($3.57M MRR) — Creator economy platform. Massive revenue, zero GitHub presence. Props-based monetization for streamers/creators.
2. **TrimRx** ($316k MRR, 12% growth) — Telehealth GLP-1 weight loss programs. Riding the Ozempic wave with software-enabled prescription services.
3. **Kibu** ($234k MRR) — Niche healthtech for I/DD provider orgs. B2B SaaS in a severely underserved vertical. 48-state footprint.
4. **Supliful** ($197k MRR) — Creator-to-CPG brand platform. Unique model: turn creators into consumer product brand owners with zero upfront costs.
5. **Dealsourcr** ($155k MRR, 24% growth) — Real estate tech. Quietly growing fast, likely riding property data demand.

### 🚀 Trending With Zero Monetization (Trendshift Only — Opportunity)

1. **CLAUDE.md files / Agent skills collections** (81k+ ⭐) — Pure open-source knowledge curation. Opportunity: premium curated skill packs, enterprise onboarding, consulting.
2. **build-your-own-x** (494.8k ⭐) — Educational mega-repo. Opportunity: interactive course platform, coding bootcamp spinoff.
3. **Computer-Use Agent infra** (14.1k ⭐) — Sandbox/SDK for desktop-controlling AI. Opportunity: managed hosting, enterprise agent deployment platform.
4. **ml-intern** (5.9k ⭐) — Open-source ML engineer agent. Opportunity: hosted ML pipeline service, enterprise version.
5. **Design.md brand systems** (64.5k ⭐) — Design spec files for AI coding. Opportunity: marketplace for premium design systems, enterprise custom design packs.

---

## Key Patterns

1. **Claude Code ecosystem explosion** — 6+ trending repos are Claude Code skills/configs/frameworks. This is becoming the dominant AI coding agent platform. Anthropic is winning the agent tooling war through community, not just capability.

2. **AI SEO / AI search visibility is the new SEO** — SEOBOT ($72k MRR, 8%), SEO Stack ($66k, 5%), AEO Engine ($54k, 8%), Launch Club (Reddit marketing for AI search) — an entire category emerging around "how do you rank in ChatGPT/Perplexity answers?"

3. **Healthtech is quietly printing** — TrimRx ($316k), Kibu ($234k), Hormone prescribing ($150k). GLP-1 telehealth especially is a gold rush. These businesses have zero tech hype but strong unit economics.

4. **Creator → business owner pipeline** — Stan ($3.6M MRR), Supliful ($197k), DM Champ ($188k). Tools that help creators monetize (beyond ads) are the biggest revenue category on TrustMRR.

5. **168% growth stealth ad AI agent** — Some unnamed company doing Google/Meta ad management with AI agents at $66k MRR growing 168%. This is the highest growth rate on the board. AI-powered ad optimization is about to eat traditional media buying.

---

## Quick Takes

- **Build for Claude Code if you want GitHub stars; build for health/creator niches if you want revenue.** The hype/revenue gap is enormous this cycle.
- **AI SEO is the new "mobile-first"** — within 12 months, every SEO tool will have an "AI visibility" module. Building pure-play AI SEO tools now is like building mobile-only apps in 2012.
- **The most interesting number this week: $3.57M MRR from Stan.** A creator monetization platform making more than most YC companies, with zero developer mindshare. The best businesses are often invisible to the tech crowd.

---

## Cross-Reference Analysis

### Overlap: Trendshift ∩ TrustMRR

**Minimal overlap this cycle.** Trendshift is dominated by open-source Claude/agent skills repos, while TrustMRR is dominated by bootstrapped SaaS. The worlds barely touch.

Near-overlaps worth noting:
- **Claude/agent skills (Trendshift)** vs **AI sales/SEO agents (TrustMRR)** — both in AI agent space but different markets. Trendshift = dev tools, TrustMRR = business tools.
- **Postiz ($98.5k MRR, social media)** vs **social media growth tools on Trendshift** — different approaches, same market.

### Trendshift-Only: Trending but No Monetization (Opportunities)

### TrustMRR-Only: Quiet Money-Makers (Hidden Gems)

| **TrimRx** | $302,707 | GLP-1 telehealth riding the Ozempic wave — $300k+ MRR and still 15% growing |

---

## Top Trends

1. **🔥 Claude Code skills are THE meta.** 7 of 20 Trendshift projects are Claude/Codex agent skills. The ecosystem is exploding around customizing AI coding agents. This is the "dotfiles moment" for AI — everyone's building their own agent configs.

2. **💰 AI sales agents printing money quietly.** DM Champ ($189k), PROSP ($128k), Bookedin ($50k) — AI that sells for you. White-label is the wedge. Nobody's excited on GitHub but the MRR is real.

3. **🏥 Health arbitrage is massive.** TrimRx ($302k GLP-1), Kibu ($234k I/DD care), Medical Practice ($150k hormones) — regulatory-compliant health businesses with tech wrappers. High MRR, sticky customers.

4. **📈 SEO/AI visibility is the new SEO.** SeoBOT, AEO Engine, Launch Club, SEO STACK — multiple startups now optimize for LLM/AI search, not just Google. New category forming.

5. **🛍️ Creator → commerce pipeline.** Stan ($3.5M!), Supliful ($196k) — platforms helping creators sell physical/digital products. The creator economy isn't just ads anymore.

## Money vs Hype Gap

**Overhyped, undermonetized:**
- Claude skills repos (millions of GitHub stars, $0 revenue) — massive audience, no monetization layer yet
- Vibe-trading / autohedge — exciting concept, unproven monetization
- Android emulator Docker — useful but niche dev tool

**Underhyped, printing money:**
- TrimRx — $302k MRR in GLP-1 telehealth, growing 15%. Riding a macro trend silently.
- Dealsourcr — $155k MRR growing 32%, completely invisible
- Kibu — $234k MRR in I/DD care, zero buzz, incredibly sticky

## Opportunities

1. **Agent skills marketplace** — 65k+ stars across Claude skill repos. Someone needs to build the Gumroad for AI agent skills. Curated, rated, monetized.
2. **AI visibility optimization** — Multiple startups targeting "GEO" (Generative Engine Optimization). Early mover advantage. Combine AEO Engine's agent orchestration with SeoBOT's SEO automation.
3. **Privacy infrastructure** — Self-hosted CAPTCHA (6k stars) + growing privacy awareness. Bundle privacy-first tools for SMBs.
4. **GLP-1 digital health wrapper** — TrimRx proves the model works at $300k+ MRR. The GLP-1 wave has 2-3 more years of growth.

## Quick Takes

- **The Claude skills meta is 2026's "dotfiles moment"** — everyone's personalizing their AI agents, and the infrastructure for sharing/selling these configs doesn't exist yet. First mover wins.
- **AI sales agents are the quietest $500k+ MRR category** — DM Champ + PROSP + Bookedin = $367k combined MRR, zero GitHub hype. The money is in B2B, not developer tools.
- **For-sale listings on TrustMRR are a signal** — Rezi ($288k), 1Capture ($214k), PROSP ($128k) are all FOR SALE. Founders cashing out at $2-4M valuations. Buyer's market for profitable micro-SaaS.

5. **AI Text Humanizer (16.3k stars)** — Open-source, but Lunchbreak makes $47k MRR doing the same thing. Proves the market.

1. **Claude Code is the new Linux** — 8/20 Trendshift projects are Claude Code skills, configs, or plugins. The ecosystem is forming faster than any previous dev tool.
2. **AI SDR is a proven market** — GojiberryAI ($272k, 53%), DM Champ ($187k), PROSP ($128k). Three startups collectively doing $600k+ MRR replacing sales reps.
3. **Open-source → SaaS pipeline is the play** — Every hot GitHub project has a paid SaaS equivalent already running. The gap is shrinking.
4. **Health niches print money silently** — TrimRx, Kibu, hormone prescribing = $673k combined MRR with zero hype.
5. **AI "humanizing" is booming both ways** — Detection evasion tools (Lunchbreak $47k MRR) + open-source humanizers (16k stars). Cat-and-mouse market.

## Money vs Hype Gap

- **Overhyped**: Claude Code skill packs — tons of stars, zero direct monetization yet. Ecosystem is early.
- **Underhyped**: Health/telehealth startups (Stan $3.5M, TrimRx $288k, Kibu $234k) — massive revenue, invisible to tech Twitter.
- **Most imbalanced**: TradingAgents (53.7k stars, $0 revenue) vs actual quant funds. Someone needs to SaaS-wrap this.

## Quick Takes

- **The "Claude Code industrial complex" is real.** When your config file gets 94k stars, the platform has arrived. Anthropic is building the next VS Code ecosystem.
- **AI SDR startups will consolidate fast.** GojiberryAI, DM Champ, and PROSP are all doing the same thing (AI outbound). Expect M&A within 6 months.
- **The stealth company at #23 with 166% growth ($68k MRR, AI ad management) is the one to watch.** If that growth holds, it's at $500k+ by Q4.

| 17 | Vid.AI | $95,589 | 4% | AI Video | Turn ideas/scripts into ready-to-post videos |
| 18 | Codédex | $83,997 | 2% | EdTech | Learn to code platform for Gen Z |
| 19 | Supergrow | $79,479 | — | Social Media | LinkedIn growth tool |
| 20 | SEOBOT | $71,730 | 9% | SEO | AI agent for SEO — keywords, research, blog, pSEO |

---

## Cross-Reference Analysis

### 🔥 Overlap: Trending AND Making Money

**1. Claude Code / Agentic Coding Ecosystem**
- Trendshift: 5+ projects in top 20 (CLAUDE.md, skills dirs, free-tier tools, CLI config, design systems)
- TrustMRR: SEOBOT ($71k MRR) uses agentic AI for SEO automation; Cometly ($215k MRR) uses AI for marketing analytics
- **Why winning:** The "agentic coding" wave is the biggest dev trend of 2026. Tools that let non-technical people command AI agents are printing money while the dev tools themselves get massive star counts. The bridge: skill files and prompt engineering becoming product.

**2. AI-Powered Marketing Automation**
- Trendshift: SEO/SEM skills for Claude Code trending; Vibe-Trading (autonomous agents)
- TrustMRR: PROSP ($128k MRR, LinkedIn AI), Postiz ($97k MRR, 15% growth, social scheduling), SEOBOT ($71k MRR, 9% growth), AEO Engine ($54k MRR)
- **Why winning:** AI marketing agents are moving from "nice to have" to table stakes. The ones packaging domain expertise (SEO, LinkedIn, social) into autonomous agents are capturing real MRR.

**3. AI Video / Content Generation**
- Trendshift: Hyperbrowser web apps, design systems (visual output), browser harness
- TrustMRR: Vid.AI ($95k MRR, AI video), Speel ($65k MRR, UGC-style AI video), Supergrow ($79k MRR)
- **Why winning:** The gap between "AI can make content" and "AI can make *good* content" is closing fast. Tools that handle the full pipeline (script → video → post) are monetizing well.

**4. Developer Education + Tools**
- Trendshift: Build Your Own X (494.8k stars), System Design (344.6k stars), Codédex
- TrustMRR: Codédex ($83k MRR, learn to code for Gen Z), DataExpert ($61k MRR)
- **Why winning:** Dev education is evergreen but Gen-Z positioning + interactive/agent-based learning is a fresh angle with real monetization.

---

### 💰 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About (TrustMRR-Only)

**1. Stan ($3.57M MRR)** — By far the biggest earner. Enables people to make a living independently. Zero presence on GitHub trending. Creator economy infrastructure that's quietly massive.

**2. TrimRx ($310k MRR, 18% growth)** — Telehealth weight loss with GLP-1 meds. Not a dev tool, not open source, not trending on GitHub. But the GLP-1 market is exploding and this is direct-to-consumer digital health at scale.

**3. Kibu ($234k MRR)** — Niche healthtech: EHR/compliance for I/DD provider organizations across 48 states. Ultra-niche, zero hype, real money. Government-adjacent SaaS with high switching costs.

**4. Supliful ($197k MRR)** — Creator CPG brand platform. Not a dev tool, not trending. But it solves a real problem: creators wanting product lines without supply chain headaches.

**5. DM Champ ($188k MRR)** — AI sales agent that white-labels. The "AI that sells for you" pitch is compelling but hasn't hit the developer hype cycle because it's targeting non-technical business owners.

---

### 🚀 Trending With No Monetization (Trendshift-Only Opportunities)

**1. CLAUDE.md (88.2k stars)** — A single file improving Claude Code behavior. Zero monetization. **Opportunity:** Premium skill packs, curated prompt libraries as SaaS, enterprise training.

**2. DESIGN.md Brand Systems (65.7k stars)** — Design system files for AI coding agents. Massive interest. **Opportunity:** Premium design system marketplace, custom brand system generation as a service.

**3. Agentic Skills Framework (167.6k stars)** — Dev methodology for agentic coding. Free, open-source. **Opportunity:** Enterprise licensing, training/certification, managed agent hosting.

**4. Lobster (363.9k stars)** — Personal AI assistant. Huge following. **Opportunity:** Premium tiers, enterprise deployment, marketplace for agent plugins.

**5. GitNexus (29.4k stars)** — Client-side code knowledge graph. Currently free. **Opportunity:** Team/enterprise features, CI integration, code intelligence API.

---

## 📊 Key Patterns

1. **Agentic coding is the dominant meta-trend.** Claude Code skills, Codex skills, browser harnesses, agent runtimes — the entire developer ecosystem is pivoting to "AI agents that code." The trendshift list is >50% agentic coding tools.

2. **GLP-1 digital health is a quiet money printer.** TrimRx ($310k MRR, 18% growth) and the medical practice ($150k MRR) show telehealth + GLP-1 is a gold rush that bypasses tech hype entirely.

3. **"For sale" everywhere on TrustMRR.** At least 8 of the top 50 startups are marked FOR SALE. Builders are flipping SaaS faster. The market is liquid but maybe frothy.

4. **SEO/LLM visibility is the new SEO.** AEO Engine, SEOBOT, SEO Stack, Launch Club — multiple startups focused on "being found by AI" not just Google. This is a new category forming in real-time.

5. **Browser-as-infrastructure for AI agents.** 3 separate trending projects (headless browser, browser harness, Hyperbrowser) all solve the same problem: AI agents need to browse the web. Infrastructure layer for the agent economy.

---

## 💡 Quick Takes

1. **Build a premium skill pack marketplace.** 5+ trending repos are skill/prompt files for Claude Code and Codex. There's clearly demand but zero monetization. A SkillPack SaaS selling curated, tested agent skill files for specific domains (SEO, legal, finance) could capture this.

2. **AI SEO → LLM visibility is the next gold rush.** Multiple startups are already doing $50-70k MRR helping businesses rank in AI answers. The first mover who nails "optimize your brand for ChatGPT/Perplexity answers" at scale will win a new category.

3. **The "FOR SALE" signal on TrustMRR is a leading indicator.** When 16% of top-earning startups are actively for sale, it means founders are cashing out, not doubling down. Possible market top for indie SaaS — or just rational portfolio management. Worth watching.

---

# Trend Analyst Daily Briefing — 2026-04-30

**Date:** Thursday, April 30, 2026
**Sources Fetched:** GitHub Trending ✅ | Trendshift ✅ | TrustMRR ✅ | Hacker News ✅ | Product Hunt ❌ (Cloudflare block)

---

## 🔥 Top 5 "Wow + Money" Overlap Projects

### 1. Warp (warpdotdev/warp)
- **Trending:** #1 GitHub Trending (12,822 stars today, 43.9K total) | Trendshift top-3
- **Revenue:** Agentic terminal/IDE — enterprise dev tools is a massive SaaS category
- **Business Model:** Freemium SaaS (enterprise licensing)
- **USP:** Agentic development environment born out of the terminal — combines AI agent workflows with terminal UX
- **Target:** Developers, engineering teams, enterprises
- **Why winning:** Riding the "agentic dev environment" wave. Terminal-native AI is a fresh angle vs. VS Code plugins.

### 2. mattpocock/skills
- **Trending:** #2 GitHub Trending (7,280 stars today, 44.6K total) | Trendshift #1
- **Revenue potential:** Skills/prompts marketplace — direct monetization via consulting + premium content
- **Business Model:** Open-source + consulting/premium content (Mattpocock is established TS educator)
- **USP:** "Skills for Real Engineers" — curated Claude Code skills directory
- **Target:** Developers using Claude Code, AI-augmented engineers
- **Why winning:** Captures the exploding "AI coding skills" meta. Everyone's building prompt libraries.

### 3. Microsoft VibeVoice
- **Trending:** #7 GitHub Trending (1,690 stars today, 45.7K total) | Trendshift top-10
- **Revenue potential:** Microsoft backing = enterprise voice AI play
- **Business Model:** Open-source core → Azure cloud services integration
- **USP:** Open-source frontier voice AI from Microsoft
- **Target:** Enterprises, voice app developers, call center automation
- **Why winning:** Microsoft open-sourcing competitive voice AI validates the market. Enterprise voice is a $20B+ TAM.

### 4. GitNexus (abhigyanpatwari/GitNexus)
- **Trending:** GitHub Trending (774 stars today, 33.3K total) | Trendshift top-20
- **Revenue potential:** Code intelligence SaaS, enterprise code exploration
- **Business Model:** Open-source client-side + potential cloud/enterprise tier
- **USP:** Zero-server code knowledge graph in your browser — drop in a repo, get interactive graph + RAG agent
- **Target:** Developers, engineering teams, code archaeologists
- **Why winning:** Client-side = zero infra cost for users. Knowledge graph for code is a proven enterprise need.

### 5. Ghostty Terminal (leaving GitHub — HN #22, 3,340 points)
- **Trending:** Massive HN discussion (3,340 points, 992 comments) about leaving GitHub
- **Revenue potential:** Dev tool with community momentum
- **Business Model:** Open-source terminal emulator
- **USP:** Fast, native GPU-based terminal; now moving off GitHub (federation of forges meta)
- **Target:** Developers, power users
- **Why winning:** The "leaving GitHub" narrative + Ghostty being genuinely excellent = massive mindshare.

---

## 💰 Top 5 Money-Makers Nobody's Talking About

### 1. Stealth Venture #1 — $879K MRR (132% growth)
- No details (stealth), but the revenue number is staggering
- Category unknown, but the growth rate suggests product-market fit

### 2. Stan — $3.57M MRR
- "Enables people to make a living and work for themselves"
- Platform/marketplace model — creator economy infrastructure
- Zero social hype but printing serious cash

### 3. Kibu — $234K MRR
- **Category:** EHR/compliance software for I/DD provider organizations
- **Target:** Healthcare orgs serving people with intellectual/developmental disabilities
- **Why hidden:** Niche healthcare compliance = unsexy but essential. 48 states covered.

### 4. BackPedal Ltd — $58.5K MRR (48% growth)
- GPS tracking + 24/7 recovery for stolen bikes/e-bikes
- Hardware + subscription model
- **Why hidden:** Niche physical security, but 48% growth is real and the problem is universal for cyclists

### 5. AEO Engine — $52.3K MRR (8% growth)
- Network of AI agents for content optimization across Google, ChatGPT, Perplexity, AI Overviews
- **Category:** AI-powered SEO/AEO (Answer Engine Optimization)
- **Why hidden:** "AEO" is newer than "SEO" — early mover in AI search optimization. 8% monthly growth = compounding nicely.

---

## 🚀 Top 5 Trending Projects with No Monetization

### 1. Zed 1.0 (HN #1, 1,492 points)
- Open-source code editor hitting 1.0
- Built in Rust, collaborative, fast
- **Opportunity:** Enterprise features, team collaboration tier, AI coding assistant integration

### 2. Copy Fail — CVE-2026-31431 (HN #2, 529 points)
- Security vulnerability disclosure at copy.fail
- **Opportunity:** Security auditing SaaS, automated CVE detection tools

### 3. OpenTrafficMap (HN #4, 139 points)
- Open-source traffic visualization
- **Opportunity:** Traffic analytics SaaS for urban planning, logistics companies

### 4. GhostTrack (GitHub Trending, 1,033 stars today)
- Phone number/location tracking tool
- **Opportunity:** Legitimate family safety / asset tracking SaaS (this is the "legal" version of what the tool does)

### 5. ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills (GitHub Trending, 1,177 stars today)
- Curated Codex skills list for workflow automation
- **Opportunity:** Skills marketplace, enterprise workflow automation platform

---

## 📊 Key Patterns

1. **The "Skills Framework" meta is exploding:** mattpocock/skills (7.2K stars/day), ComposioHQ/awesome-codex-skills, obra/superpowers — all trending simultaneously. The AI coding skills/prompt layer is becoming its own ecosystem. This is the new "npm for AI workflows."

2. **Voice AI goes open-source mainstream:** Microsoft VibeVoice (45K+ stars) + Mistral Medium 3.5 launch (423 HN points) = voice AI is commoditizing fast. Enterprise voice will be the next battleground.

3. **"Agentic dev environment" wars:** Warp (terminal), jcode (Rust harness), craft-agents-oss — the IDE/terminal is being rebuilt around agent workflows. Not "AI in your editor" but "your editor IS an agent."

4. **Ghostty leaving GitHub = forge federation momentum:** HN's #1 multi-day story. Combined with "We need a federation of forges" (515 points), the market is signaling demand for decentralized code hosting.

5. **Claude Code security incident (HN #5, 972 points):** HERMES.md in commit messages routes requests to extra billing. This is a trust-breaking moment for AI coding tools and validates the need for transparent agent billing.

---

## 💡 Quick Takes

1. **Build a "skills marketplace" now.** The mattpocock/skills and awesome-codex-skills trend proves demand. A curated, rated, monetizable skills directory for Claude Code / Codex / Cursor is a $10M+ opportunity. First-mover advantage is still open.

2. **Voice AI is about to be free.** Microsoft open-sourcing frontier voice AI means the base model cost goes to zero. The money is in fine-tuning for verticals (healthcare, customer service, education). Build the wrapper, not the model.

3. **SEO is becoming AEO (Answer Engine Optimization).** With ChatGPT, Perplexity, and Google AI Overviews eating search traffic, traditional SEO is dying. AEO Engine at $52K MRR is early proof. Every SEO agency will need to become an AEO agency within 12 months.

---

| Trendshift | ✅ Success | Star counts + trending positions |
| TrustMRR | ✅ Success | Top 50 startups with MRR data |

| Product Hunt | ❌ Cloudflare block | JS challenge not passable in headless |

### New Sources Discovered

### Registry Updates
- Product Hunt: `fetchFailures` +1 (now 1). Lowered reliability to 0.75.
- Hacker News: First fetch failed, retry succeeded. No score change.
- All other sources: `reliability` +0.02 bump for successful fetch.

Not strongly hyped today but already has revenue traction. |

---

## 💰 Top 5 money-makers nobody’s talking about

These appear in TrustMRR but did not appear prominently in today’s GitHub/Trendshift/HN/Product Hunt signals.

## 🚀 Top 5 trending projects with no obvious monetization

| 2 | **obra/superpowers** | GitHub Trending + Trendshift | Open-source | Agentic skills framework and methodology | Engineering teams adopting agents | Agentic development | Monetize implementation templates, team onboarding, governance. |

---

## Additional projects/startups observed

### GitHub / Trendshift trend list

| Project | Signal | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **browserbase/skills** | GitHub Trending, 69 stars today | Open-source + Browserbase platform pull-through | Claude Agent SDK with browser tool | Agent developers | Browser agents |
| **craft-agents-oss** | GitHub Trending, 319 stars today | Open-source / services | TypeScript agent framework | Developers | AI agents |
| **public-apis** | GitHub/Trendshift recurring evergreen | Open-source | Collective list of free APIs | Developers | Developer resources |
| **GhostTrack / maigret** | GitHub/Trendshift security/OSINT interest | Open-source | Username/location/OSINT collection tools | Security researchers, OSINT users | Security tooling |
| **ghostty** | GitHub/Trendshift recurring | Open-source | Fast native GPU terminal | Developers | Terminal/dev tools |
| **zed-editor** | Trendshift recurring | Open-source + possible future SaaS/team features | High-performance multiplayer editor | Developers | Code editor |
| **Telegram cloud storage app** | Trendshift New 2026 | Open-source | Turns Telegram account into storage drive | Power users | Storage/tooling |
| **Design skills / brand design-system repos** | Trendshift New 2026 | Open-source / services potential | Drop-in design guidance for coding agents | Designers, frontend teams | AI-assisted design |

### TrustMRR revenue list highlights

| Project | MRR / growth | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category |
|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| **DM Champ** | **$187,156 MRR**, +2% | SaaS / white-label | AI sales closer for high-ticket treatments | Clinics, agencies | AI sales automation |
| **Dealsourcr Ltd** | **$160,869 MRR**, +34% | Software | Deal sourcing workflow | Investors/operators | Deal sourcing |
| **PROSP** | **$128,005 MRR** | SaaS | AI LinkedIn outreach | Sales teams | Sales automation |
| **Vid.AI** | **$95,389 MRR** | SaaS | Script/idea-to-video automation | Creators, marketers | AI video |
| **Codédex** | **$83,831 MRR**, +3% | Edtech subscription | Gen Z coding education | Students, beginners | Developer education |
| **Supergrow** | **$79,479 MRR** | SaaS | Likely LinkedIn/personal-brand growth tooling | Creators, founders | Creator marketing |
| **Slop cannon** | **$72,278 MRR**, +165% | SaaS | High-volume AI content generation | Marketers/operators | AI content |
| **Speel.co** | **$65,843 MRR** | SaaS | AI UGC-style videos/images for ads | DTC brands, agencies | AI ads |
| **SEO STACK** | **$65,042 MRR** | SaaS | Search console/analytics rebuild with AI/LLM visibility | SEOs, marketers | SEO/AEO |
| **BackPedal** | **$58,970 MRR**, +188% | Hardware + subscription | GPS tracking and bike recovery | Bike/e-bike owners | Physical security |
| **polysight.app** | **$57,797 MRR**, +7% | SaaS | AI tooling for prediction markets | Traders | Fintech/AI |
| **Bookedin** | **$49,878 MRR**, +3% | SaaS | No-code AI receptionists/sales agents | Agencies, local businesses | Voice/SMS AI agents |
| **Launch Club** | **$47,500 MRR**, +11% | SaaS + community/services | Reddit marketing to improve AI search | Business owners, B2B SaaS | Reddit/GEO marketing |
| **OpenLimits** | **$39,671 MRR** | Managed API SaaS | Authenticated endpoints/admin for third-party AI services | Developers, businesses | AI API infrastructure |

### Hacker News / security pulse

| Topic/project | Signal | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Copy Fail / Xint Code** | Dedicated CVE site; high-impact Linux LPE/container escape primitive | Security audit services / AI security scanning | Claims AI-assisted discovery of kernel bug in ~1 hour scan time | Security teams, infra companies | AI security / vuln research |
| **Semgrep PyTorch Lightning malware post** | HN front page, 332 points | SaaS / security platform | Supply-chain analysis for malicious dependency in AI training library | DevSecOps, AI infra teams | Supply-chain security |
| **watchTowr cPanel/WHM auth bypass** | HN front page | Security research/services | High-signal exploit writeups for internet-facing enterprise software | Security teams, MSPs | Vulnerability research |
| **Honker** | HN front page, 180 points | Open-source / potential hosted support | Durable queues, streams, pub/sub and cron inside SQLite | Backend developers | Dev infrastructure |
| **BidProwl** | HN front page, 249 points | Likely SaaS/search monetization | Aggregates 28 US government auction sites into one search | Resellers, bargain hunters, operators | Vertical search |
| **OpenWarp** | HN #1 new item during fetch | Unknown | Open-source/alternative angle around Warp | Developers | Dev tools |

---

## Cross-reference analysis

### Projects/categories appearing across multiple sources

- **Agentic developer tooling:** Warp, skills, superpowers, jcode, browserbase/skills, craft-agents-oss, design-system skills. This is the day’s dominant hype cluster.
- **AI search / GEO / SEO monetization:** AEO Engine, SEOBOT, SEO STACK, Launch Club and Reddit GEO agency listings show real buyer spend despite limited Hacker News/GitHub hype.
- **Security and AI supply-chain risk:** Copy Fail, Semgrep, watchTowr, Linux kernel vulnerability discussion, and OSINT repos all point to security as a durable attention cluster.
- **AI-generated content/video/ads:** Speel, Vid.AI, Slop cannon, thumbnail creator and design-skill repos show continued demand for generation pipelines.

### Zero-monetization opportunities

- **Agent skill registries/frameworks** have massive developer excitement but mostly open-source monetization. Opportunity: hosted skill marketplace, enterprise governance, evals, team rollout, and curated workflow packs.
- **SQLite/local-first infra tools** such as Honker can become paid hosted support, observability, or managed embedded infra.
- **AI trading frameworks** attract attention but need trustworthy monetization around data, simulation, compliance, and broker integrations.

### Money but low hype

- **Vertical healthcare/compliance SaaS** (Kibu, TrimRx) prints revenue with little developer-community excitement.
- **AI SEO/GEO tools** are quietly monetizing because the ROI pain is immediate and measurable.
- **Creator/sales enablement tools** continue to monetize strongly even when they are not technically novel.

---

## Conclusions

### 1. Top Trends

1. **Agentic dev environments and skills are the main hype engine.** Warp plus multiple skills/framework repos dominated GitHub/Trendshift.
2. **AI search optimization is already a revenue category.** TrustMRR shows multiple AEO/SEO/GEO products above **$47K–$69K+ MRR**.
3. **Security is spiking around AI supply chains and kernel/container boundaries.** Copy Fail, Semgrep and watchTowr all point to urgent infrastructure risk.
4. **AI sales/content tools still monetize, but differentiation is thinner.** GojiberryAI, DM Champ, Speel, Vid.AI, Slop cannon show revenue; defensibility depends on distribution/workflow lock-in.
5. **Vertical SaaS remains less hyped but financially resilient.** Kibu, TrimRx and BackPedal show boring categories with strong willingness to pay.

### 2. Money vs Hype Gap

- **Hyped but not monetizing:** open-source agent skills, coding harnesses, AI finance frameworks, OSINT/security tools.
- **Monetizing but not hyped:** creator commerce, healthcare compliance, resume/career tooling, local SEO/AEO, attribution, AI sales operations.
- **Best bridge:** products that turn AI hype into measurable workflow ROI — developer productivity, search visibility, pipeline generation, security risk reduction.

### 3. Opportunities

- **Enterprise agent-skill operations:** versioning, permissions, evals, compliance, ROI tracking for agent skills.
- **AI-era security scanning:** supply-chain and kernel/container risk narratives are front-page material and budget-aligned.
- **GEO/Reddit/AI-search tooling:** multiple paid listings suggest a still-fragmented market with demand for dashboards and managed execution.
- **Monetize open-source devtools via managed cloud/team plans:** jcode, Honker-style infra, Quarkdown publishing, and design-skill packs have obvious team SaaS extensions.

### 4. Quick Takes

- **If it helps teams control agents, it can charge.** Skill files and harnesses are moving from hobby artifacts to operational infrastructure.
- **The quiet money is in unglamorous workflows.** Healthcare compliance, resumes, outbound, attribution and SEO keep beating flashier open-source projects on revenue.
- **Security vendors should package AI supply-chain risk now.** HN attention plus real CVE stories create a timely wedge for DevSecOps budgets.

### 5. Source Health

- **Worked:** GitHub Trending, Trendshift, TrustMRR, Hacker News, Copy Fail.
- **Failed:** Product Hunt via required dedicated browser profile due to Cloudflare security verification.
- **Added:** Semgrep Blog, watchTowr Labs, Xint Blog for security trend tracking.
- **Caveats:** Product Hunt unavailable; Trendshift extraction was name-poor; TrustMRR revenue is treated as self-reported/verified-by-platform but still may include stealth, duplicate, or for-sale listings; this dry run did not send Telegram.

# Trend Analyst Daily Intelligence Briefing

**Date:** 2026-05-01 UTC  
**Fetch window:** ~02:45 UTC  
**Registry-driven sources analyzed:** GitHub Trending, Trendshift, TrustMRR, Hacker News, Product Hunt, Copy Fail

## Executive Telegram Summary

🔥 **Top 5 “Wow + Money” overlap projects**
1. **Warp** — dominant agentic dev-tool signal across GitHub/Trendshift/HN; monetization via freemium/team developer workflow.
2. **Postiz** — **$101,028 MRR**, +16%; AI/agentic social scheduling with real SMB/agency spend.
3. **AEO Engine** — **$52,294 MRR**, +8%; direct beneficiary of AI-search/GEO budget shifts.
4. **SEOBOT** — **$69,174 MRR**, +11%; AI SEO/content automation still converting spend.
5. **GojiberryAI** — **$275,047 MRR**, +48%; AI outbound has measurable revenue pull despite category crowding.

💰 **Top 5 money-makers nobody’s talking about**
1. **Stan** — **$3,569,654 MRR** creator-commerce platform.
2. **Rezi** — **$290,792 MRR**, +52% resume/career tooling.
3. **TrimRx** — **$262,352 MRR**, +8% GLP-1 telehealth.
4. **Kibu** — **$234,319 MRR** healthcare compliance/EHR vertical SaaS.
5. **Cometly** — **$213,240 MRR**, +2% attribution and ads analytics.

🚀 **Top 5 trending projects with no obvious monetization**
1. **mattpocock/skills** — 6,187 GitHub stars today; Claude skills for engineers.
2. **obra/superpowers** — agentic skills framework; appears across GitHub/Trendshift.
3. **TradingAgents** — multi-agent LLM trading framework; strong fintech-builder attention.
4. **jcode** — recurring Rust coding-agent harness; 675 stars today.
5. **quarkdown** — Markdown publishing superpowers; 177 stars today.

📊 **Key patterns**
- Agentic dev environments and skill packs are the strongest hype cluster.
- AI-search/GEO/SEO tooling is quietly becoming a real paid category.
- Security attention is clustering around AI supply chains, kernel/container issues, and internet-facing auth bypasses.
- Vertical SaaS and creator/sales tooling continue to monetize better than most flashy open-source trends.

💡 **Quick takes**
- If it helps teams control, evaluate, or deploy agents, it can probably charge.
- The quiet money is in measurable workflow ROI: SEO visibility, pipeline, compliance, attribution, and healthcare operations.
- Security vendors should package AI supply-chain and container-boundary risk immediately while attention is high.

---

## Source Health

| Source | Method | Result | Notes |
|---|---:|---|---|
| GitHub Trending | web_fetch | ✅ Success | Good daily open-source momentum signal, though readability extraction omitted some metadata for top rows. |
| Trendshift | web_fetch | ✅ Success | Useful broad GitHub/open-source trend list; names are partially stripped by extractor, requiring inference from descriptions. |
| TrustMRR | web_fetch | ✅ Success | Strong revenue signal with MRR and growth %, but includes stealth/for-sale listings and self-reported revenue. |
| Hacker News | web_fetch | ✅ Success | Strong community pulse; high noise outside SaaS/AI, but security/dev-infra themes were clear. |
| Product Hunt | browser profile `trend-scout` | ❌ Failed | Cloudflare security verification persisted in dedicated profile; no public launch data recovered. |
| Copy Fail | web_fetch | ✅ Success | Security trend source from prior discovery; high-depth single-issue source rather than a broad market aggregator. |

**New sources discovered for future tracking:** Semgrep Blog, watchTowr Labs, Xint Blog.  
**Caveats:** Product Hunt launch data was unavailable; Trendshift extraction was name-poor; TrustMRR revenue should be treated as platform-reported and may include stealth, duplicate, or for-sale listings.

---

## 🔥 Top 5 “Wow + Money” overlap projects

Exact overlap between revenue databases and hype sources was limited today. The strongest overlaps are category-level bridges between visible attention and paid demand.

| Rank | Project | Evidence | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category | Why it is winning |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Warp** | #1-ish on GitHub/Trendshift; HN discussed OpenWarp | Freemium SaaS / team dev environment | Agentic terminal/development environment with modern UX | Developers, engineering teams | Agentic dev tools | Developer workflows are moving from editor-only assistants to terminal/workspace agents. Sustained recurrence from prior tracking. |
| 2 | **Postiz** | TrustMRR **$101,028 MRR**, +16%; prior trend history | SaaS | Agentic social media scheduler | Creators, agencies, SMB marketers | Social media automation | Monetizes a mature workflow while adding AI/agentic positioning. Not strongly hyped today but already has revenue traction. |
| 3 | **AEO Engine** | TrustMRR **$52,294 MRR**, +8%; aligns with AI-search/GEO trend | SaaS | Agent network for visibility across Google, ChatGPT, AI Overviews, Perplexity | SEO teams, agencies, B2B SaaS | AI search optimization | Clear money/hype bridge: AI discovery is replacing classic SEO, and buyers have immediate ROI pressure. |
| 4 | **SEOBOT** | TrustMRR **$69,174 MRR**, +11%; aligns with SEO automation trend | SaaS | AI agent for keywords, research, blog, pSEO, mini apps | Founders, marketers, agencies | SEO automation | Automation of content operations is still monetizing even when not front-page-hyped. |
| 5 | **GojiberryAI** | TrustMRR **$275,047 MRR**, +48% | SaaS | Signal-based AI outbound replacing SDR workflows | Sales orgs, B2B SaaS | AI sales automation | High MRR and strong growth indicate buyers still pay for measurable pipeline automation despite crowded AI sales tooling. |

---

## 💰 Top 5 money-makers nobody’s talking about

These appeared in TrustMRR but did not appear prominently in today’s GitHub/Trendshift/HN/Product Hunt signals.

| Rank | Project | MRR / growth | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category |
|---:|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **Stan** | **$3,569,654 MRR** | Marketplace / creator commerce platform | Helps creators sell products/services and run independent businesses | Creators, solopreneurs | Creator economy |
| 2 | **Rezi** | **$290,792 MRR**, +52% | Freemium SaaS / enterprise | Resume builder with large user acquisition and emerging enterprise/university channel | Job seekers, universities, employers | Career tools |
| 3 | **TrimRx** | **$262,352 MRR**, +8% | Telehealth subscription / medical service | Personalized GLP-1 weight-loss programs with providers and pharmacies | Consumers seeking weight loss | Healthtech |
| 4 | **Kibu** | **$234,319 MRR** | Vertical SaaS | EHR, content, compliance for organizations serving people with I/DD | Healthcare/provider orgs | Healthcare compliance SaaS |
| 5 | **Cometly** | **$213,240 MRR**, +2% | SaaS | Marketing attribution + AI chat over ads data | SaaS marketing teams | Analytics / attribution |

---

## 🚀 Top 5 trending projects with no obvious monetization

| Rank | Project | Evidence | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category | Opportunity |
|---:|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | **mattpocock/skills** | GitHub Trending, **6,187 stars today** | Open-source + creator/consulting halo | Practical Claude skills for engineers | Developers using AI coding tools | AI coding skills | Package skills as paid team playbooks, CI evaluators, or training. |
| 2 | **obra/superpowers** | GitHub Trending + Trendshift | Open-source | Agentic skills framework and methodology | Engineering teams adopting agents | Agentic development | Monetize implementation templates, team onboarding, governance. |
| 3 | **TradingAgents** | GitHub Trending + Trendshift | Open-source | Multi-agent LLM trading framework | Quant hobbyists, fintech devs | AI finance/dev tools | Hosted backtesting, data connectors, broker integrations. |
| 4 | **jcode** | GitHub Trending, **675 stars today**; recurring from prior run | Open-source | Coding agent harness in Rust | Developers, AI agent builders | Coding-agent infrastructure | Paid hosted harness/evaluation service or enterprise agent workflow toolkit. |
| 5 | **quarkdown** | GitHub Trending, **177 stars today** | Open-source | Markdown with publishing superpowers for papers, slides, books, sites | Technical writers, educators, docs teams | Publishing/dev tools | Hosted collaboration/export pipeline could monetize teams. |

---

## Additional projects/startups observed

### GitHub / Trendshift trend list

| Project | Signal | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **browserbase/skills** | GitHub Trending, 69 stars today | Open-source + Browserbase platform pull-through | Claude Agent SDK with browser tool | Agent developers | Browser agents |
| **craft-agents-oss** | GitHub Trending, 319 stars today | Open-source / services | TypeScript agent framework | Developers | AI agents |
| **public-apis** | GitHub/Trendshift recurring evergreen | Open-source | Collective list of free APIs | Developers | Developer resources |
| **GhostTrack / maigret** | GitHub/Trendshift security/OSINT interest | Open-source | Username/location/OSINT collection tools | Security researchers, OSINT users | Security tooling |
| **ghostty** | GitHub/Trendshift recurring | Open-source | Fast native GPU terminal | Developers | Terminal/dev tools |
| **zed-editor** | Trendshift recurring | Open-source + possible future SaaS/team features | High-performance multiplayer editor | Developers | Code editor |
| **Telegram cloud storage app** | Trendshift New 2026 | Open-source | Turns Telegram account into storage drive | Power users | Storage/tooling |
| **Design skills / brand design-system repos** | Trendshift New 2026 | Open-source / services potential | Drop-in design guidance for coding agents | Designers, frontend teams | AI-assisted design |

### TrustMRR revenue list highlights

| Project | MRR / growth | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category |
|---|---:|---|---|---|---|
| **DM Champ** | **$187,156 MRR**, +2% | SaaS / white-label | AI sales closer for high-ticket treatments | Clinics, agencies | AI sales automation |
| **Dealsourcr Ltd** | **$160,869 MRR**, +34% | Software | Deal sourcing workflow | Investors/operators | Deal sourcing |
| **PROSP** | **$128,005 MRR** | SaaS | AI LinkedIn outreach | Sales teams | Sales automation |
| **Vid.AI** | **$95,389 MRR** | SaaS | Script/idea-to-video automation | Creators, marketers | AI video |
| **Codédex** | **$83,831 MRR**, +3% | Edtech subscription | Gen Z coding education | Students, beginners | Developer education |
| **Supergrow** | **$79,479 MRR** | SaaS | Likely LinkedIn/personal-brand growth tooling | Creators, founders | Creator marketing |
| **Slop cannon** | **$72,278 MRR**, +165% | SaaS | High-volume AI content generation | Marketers/operators | AI content |
| **Speel.co** | **$65,843 MRR** | SaaS | AI UGC-style videos/images for ads | DTC brands, agencies | AI ads |
| **SEO STACK** | **$65,042 MRR** | SaaS | Search console/analytics rebuild with AI/LLM visibility | SEOs, marketers | SEO/AEO |
| **BackPedal** | **$58,970 MRR**, +188% | Hardware + subscription | GPS tracking and bike recovery | Bike/e-bike owners | Physical security |
| **polysight.app** | **$57,797 MRR**, +7% | SaaS | AI tooling for prediction markets | Traders | Fintech/AI |
| **Bookedin** | **$49,878 MRR**, +3% | SaaS | No-code AI receptionists/sales agents | Agencies, local businesses | Voice/SMS AI agents |
| **Launch Club** | **$47,500 MRR**, +11% | SaaS + community/services | Reddit marketing to improve AI search | Business owners, B2B SaaS | Reddit/GEO marketing |
| **OpenLimits** | **$39,671 MRR** | Managed API SaaS | Authenticated endpoints/admin for third-party AI services | Developers, businesses | AI API infrastructure |

### Hacker News / security pulse

| Topic/project | Signal | Business model | USP | Target customers | Category |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| **Copy Fail / Xint Code** | Dedicated CVE site; high-impact Linux LPE/container escape primitive | Security audit services / AI security scanning | Claims AI-assisted discovery of kernel bug in ~1 hour scan time | Security teams, infra companies | AI security / vuln research |
| **Semgrep PyTorch Lightning malware post** | HN front page, 332 points | SaaS / security platform | Supply-chain analysis for malicious dependency in AI training library | DevSecOps, AI infra teams | Supply-chain security |
| **watchTowr cPanel/WHM auth bypass** | HN front page | Security research/services | High-signal exploit writeups for internet-facing enterprise software | Security teams, MSPs | Vulnerability research |
| **Honker** | HN front page, 180 points | Open-source / potential hosted support | Durable queues, streams, pub/sub and cron inside SQLite | Backend developers | Dev infrastructure |
| **BidProwl** | HN front page, 249 points | Likely SaaS/search monetization | Aggregates 28 US government auction sites into one search | Resellers, bargain hunters, operators | Vertical search |
| **OpenWarp** | HN #1 new item during fetch | Unknown | Open-source/alternative angle around Warp | Developers | Dev tools |

---

## Cross-reference analysis

### Projects/categories appearing across multiple sources

- **Agentic developer tooling:** Warp, skills, superpowers, jcode, browserbase/skills, craft-agents-oss, and design-system skills. This is the day’s dominant hype cluster.
- **AI search / GEO / SEO monetization:** AEO Engine, SEOBOT, SEO STACK, Launch Club, and Reddit GEO agency listings show real buyer spend despite limited Hacker News/GitHub hype.
- **Security and AI supply-chain risk:** Copy Fail, Semgrep, watchTowr, Linux kernel vulnerability discussion, and OSINT repos all point to security as a durable attention cluster.
- **AI-generated content/video/ads:** Speel, Vid.AI, Slop cannon, thumbnail creator tooling, and design-skill repos show continued demand for generation pipelines.

### Zero-monetization opportunities

- **Agent skill registries/frameworks** have massive developer excitement but mostly open-source monetization. Opportunity: hosted skill marketplace, enterprise governance, evals, team rollout, and curated workflow packs.
- **SQLite/local-first infra tools** such as Honker can become paid hosted support, observability, or managed embedded infra.
- **AI trading frameworks** attract attention but need trustworthy monetization around data, simulation, compliance, and broker integrations.

### Money but low hype

- **Vertical healthcare/compliance SaaS** such as Kibu and TrimRx prints revenue with little developer-community excitement.
- **AI SEO/GEO tools** are quietly monetizing because the ROI pain is immediate and measurable.
- **Creator/sales enablement tools** continue to monetize strongly even when they are not technically novel.

---

## Conclusions

### 1. Top Trends

1. **Agentic dev environments and skills are the main hype engine.** Warp plus multiple skills/framework repos dominated GitHub/Trendshift.
2. **AI search optimization is already a revenue category.** TrustMRR shows multiple AEO/SEO/GEO products above **$47K–$69K+ MRR**.
3. **Security is spiking around AI supply chains and kernel/container boundaries.** Copy Fail, Semgrep and watchTowr all point to urgent infrastructure risk.
4. **AI sales/content tools still monetize, but differentiation is thinner.** GojiberryAI, DM Champ, Speel, Vid.AI and Slop cannon show revenue; defensibility depends on distribution/workflow lock-in.
5. **Vertical SaaS remains less hyped but financially resilient.** Kibu, TrimRx and BackPedal show less glamorous categories with strong willingness to pay.

### 2. Money vs Hype Gap

- **Hyped but not monetizing:** open-source agent skills, coding harnesses, AI finance frameworks, OSINT/security tools.
- **Monetizing but not hyped:** creator commerce, healthcare compliance, resume/career tooling, local SEO/AEO, attribution, AI sales operations.
- **Best bridge:** products that turn AI hype into measurable workflow ROI — developer productivity, search visibility, pipeline generation, and security risk reduction.

### 3. Opportunities

- **Enterprise agent-skill operations:** versioning, permissions, evals, compliance, and ROI tracking for agent skills.
- **AI-era security scanning:** supply-chain and kernel/container risk narratives are front-page material and budget-aligned.
- **GEO/Reddit/AI-search tooling:** multiple paid listings suggest a still-fragmented market with demand for dashboards and managed execution.
- **Monetize open-source devtools via managed cloud/team plans:** jcode, Honker-style infra, Quarkdown publishing, and design-skill packs have obvious team SaaS extensions.

### 4. Quick Takes

- **If it helps teams control agents, it can charge.** Skill files and harnesses are moving from hobby artifacts to operational infrastructure.
- **The quiet money is in unglamorous workflows.** Healthcare compliance, resumes, outbound, attribution and SEO keep beating flashier open-source projects on revenue.
- **Security vendors should package AI supply-chain risk now.** HN attention plus real CVE stories create a timely wedge for DevSecOps budgets.

### 5. Source Health

- **Worked:** GitHub Trending, Trendshift, TrustMRR, Hacker News, Copy Fail.
- **Failed:** Product Hunt via required dedicated browser profile due to Cloudflare security verification.
- **Added to future tracking:** Semgrep Blog, watchTowr Labs, Xint Blog for security trend monitoring.
- **Caveats:** Product Hunt unavailable; Trendshift extraction was name-poor; TrustMRR revenue is treated as self-reported/platform-reported and may include stealth, duplicate, or for-sale listings.
